evidence_snippet: Edmund burned in the «Field of Fire» alongside his father, brothers, and sons when Aegon and his sisters, «Visenya» and «Rhaenys», unleashed the fury of their «dragons».
When his father, King «Mern IX», made an alliance with «Loren I Lannister», «King of the Rock», to join their armies against «Aegon the Conqueror», Edmund was given the vanguard.
Edmund burned in the «Field of Fire» alongside his father, brothers, and sons when Aegon and his sisters, «Visenya» and «Rhaenys», unleashed the fury of their «dragons».
